Home / Services / Impact Windows & Doors

Impact Windows & Doors

Enhance your home's safety and security with our impact windows and doors.

Protect your home from hurricanes and intruders with HG Construction Inc.'s impact windows and doors. Living in Miami means being prepared for the unexpected, and impact windows and doors are a crucial investment in your family's safety and security. We offer a wide selection of high-quality impact windows and doors that meet Miami-Dade County's stringent building codes.

Our impact windows and doors are designed to withstand hurricane-force winds and flying debris, providing superior protection for your home. They also offer added benefits such as noise reduction, increased energy efficiency, and enhanced security. We work with leading manufacturers to ensure you receive the best products available.

We're committed to providing expert installation and exceptional customer service. Our team will work closely with you to select the right impact windows and doors for your home and budget. We also handle all necessary permitting and ensure your installation meets all local building codes. Invest in your safety and security with HG Construction Inc.'s impact windows and doors.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Consultation - Discuss your needs and budget.
  2. 02 Step 2: Product Selection - Choose the right impact windows and doors for your home.
  3. 03 Step 3: Installation - Expertly install your impact windows and doors with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Inspection - Ensure your installation meets all local building codes.

Benefits

  • Hurricane protection
  • Enhanced security
  • Noise reduction
  • Improved energy efficiency

Frequently Asked Questions

Are impact windows required in Miami?

While not always required, impact windows are highly recommended for homes in Miami-Dade County due to the high risk of hurricanes.

Do impact windows reduce noise?

Yes, impact windows provide excellent noise reduction, creating a quieter and more peaceful living environment.

Are impact windows energy efficient?

Yes, impact windows are highly energy efficient, helping to reduce your energy bills and keep your home comfortable year-round.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with impact windows & doors? Contact us today.
